set.body: Round 4 H4 lint pass (rule P12) found two double-drop sites not covered by existing amatrix-4q9/8kj/74d: backend-planning.R:395 and models-lm.R:620. Both have unconditional try(backend$resident_drop(out_key)) after an error-handler drop of the same key. Fix: same shape as the amatrix-8kj resolution <e2><80><94> use on.exit with a release flag. STATIC/INFERRED <e2><80><94> needs a runtime repro. Promotion snippet: force backend$crossprod_resident to throw after allocation; expect single drop.
set.title: [bug] Net-new double-drop sites: backend-planning.R:395 and models-lm.R:620
